name: MIRA Scheduled Tasks — Proactive alerts and reports
info:
5 scheduled flows:
1. Fault Watchdog (60s)
2. Morning Briefing (06:00)
3. Shift Handoff (06:00, 14:00, 22:00)
4. Comms Health (5min)
5. Weekly Trend (Monday 07:00)

All POST to Slack via SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL env var.

name: Unalerted faults
sql: SELECT f.id, f.equipment_id, f.fault_code, f.description, f.severity, f.timestamp, e.name as equipment_name FROM faults f JOIN equipment_status e ON f.equipment_id = e.equipment_id WHERE f.resolved = 0 AND f.alerted = 0

name: Format fault alerts
Build UPDATE query
24h summary
sql: SELECT 'faults_24h' as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM faults WHERE timestamp >= datetime('now', '-24 hours') UNION ALL SELECT 'active_faults', COUNT(*) FROM faults WHERE resolved = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'equipment_count', COUNT(*) FROM equipment_status UNION ALL SELECT 'running_count', COUNT(*) FROM equipment_status WHERE status = 'running'

name: Format briefing
8h events
sql: SELECT f.fault_code, f.description, f.severity, f.timestamp, f.resolved, e.name as equipment_name FROM faults f JOIN equipment_status e ON f.equipment_id = e.equipment_id WHERE f.timestamp >= datetime('now', '-8 hours') ORDER BY f.timestamp DESC

name: Format handoff
Check response
7-day stats
sql: SELECT date(f.timestamp) as day, COUNT(*) as fault_count, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT f.fault_code) as codes FROM faults f WHERE f.timestamp >= datetime('now', '-7 days') GROUP BY date(f.timestamp) ORDER BY day

name: Format trend
